hooks.command:
node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const e=JSON.parse(d);const f=e.tool_input&&(e.tool_input.file_path||'');if(f&&/\.sql$/i.test(f))console.log('[Form Builder] SQL file modified: '+f+'
Checklist:
  (1) Wrapped in BEGIN TRANSACTION / COMMIT / ROLLBACK?
  (2) Uses SCOPE_IDENTITY() for new IDs?
  (3) Indexes reviewed? (see CLAUDE.md section 17)
  (4) Migration filename: YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS_description.sql');}catch(x){}})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const e=JSON.parse(d);const payload=JSON.stringify(e.tool_input||'');if(/definition_json|condition_json|trigger.*json/i.test(payload))console.log('[Form Builder] JSON definition content detected.\nReminder: Run /validate-form-json before committing to verify schema compliance.');}catch(x){}})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const e=JSON.parse(d);const f=e.tool_input&&(e.tool_input.file_path||'');const content=e.tool_input&&(e.tool_input.content||e.tool_input.new_string||'');if(f&&/\.component\.(ts|html)$/i.test(f)&&content){const hardcoded=(content.match(/formControlName=\"[a-z_]+\"/gi)||[]);if(hardcoded.length>0)console.log('[Form Builder] Hardcoded formControlName detected: '+hardcoded.join(', ')+'\nFor the dynamic form renderer, use dynamic binding instead: [formControlName]=\"field.key\"\nHardcoded bindings break when field_key values change in definition_json.');}}catch(x){}})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const e=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=e.tool_input&&e.tool_input.command||'';const dangerous=['DROP TABLE','DROP DATABASE','TRUNCATE TABLE','DELETE FROM Forms','DELETE FROM FormVersions','DELETE FROM SubmissionValues','DELETE FROM Fields'];const found=dangerous.filter(p=>new RegExp(p,'i').test(cmd));if(found.length){console.error('[BLOCKED] Dangerous SQL operation detected: '+found.join(', ')+'\nEnsure a database backup exists and this change has been reviewed.\nRemove this block in settings.json only if you are certain.');process.exit(2);}}catch(x){}})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const e=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=e.tool_input&&e.tool_input.command||'';if(/sqlcmd|osql/i.test(cmd)&&/production|prod/i.test(cmd)){console.error('[WARNING] Detected possible production database operation.\nConfirm this is intentional before proceeding.');}}catch(x){}})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const e=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=e.tool_input&&e.tool_input.command||'';const versionMutations=['UPDATE.*FormVersions','DELETE.*ConditionalRules','DELETE.*TaskTriggers'];const found=versionMutations.filter(p=>new RegExp(p,'i').test(cmd));if(found.length){console.error('[WARNING] Version-locked data mutation detected: '+found.join(', ')+'
If this form version is published (published=1), these changes corrupt historical submission records.
Best practice: clone the version first with /clone-form-version, make changes on the new version.
Verify: SELECT published FROM FormVersions WHERE version_id = <id>');}}catch(x){}})"

node -e "console.log('
[Form Builder] Session ended. End-of-session checklist:
  1. Run any pending DB migrations (db/migrations/)
  2. Validate modified definition_json with /validate-form-json
  3. Test conditional rules in the Angular form renderer
  4. Verify task triggers fire correctly through the submission flow
  5. Commit only to src/, db/migrations/, tests/ directories')"
